title: StorageEye
description: This mod adds a smart storage overview to Minecraft. Mark containers with a stick to see floating item icons, search your entire storage via GUI, and locate items. You can do that with the /chests comand
body:
StorageEye is a lightweight Fabric mod designed to help you organize and navigate your storage systems with ease. No more opening dozens of chests to find that one stack of diamonds!

Features:
Floating Labels: Shift-right-click any container with a stick to display a small, permanent floating icon of the most frequent item inside.

Global View: Use /chests view to see a sorted list of every item in your marked containers.

Smart Search: Shift-click an item in the GUI or use /chests search <name> to trigger a green particle effect around the chests containing that item.

Highlight Mode: Use /chests highlight to briefly show all marked containers in your area.

Requirements: Fabric API is required. Works best on both Client and Server!
